data.title: HF Foods Group Launches $100M ATM Equity Offering
data.description:
HF Foods Group ( (HFFG) ) has issued an announcement.

On September 25, 2025, HF Foods Group Inc. announced the establishment of an At-The-Market (ATM) equity offering program, allowing the company to sell shares of its common stock for up to $100 million through sales agents D.A. Davidson & Co. and Roth Capital Partners. The proceeds from this offering are intended for general corporate purposes, including working capital, capital expenditures, and potential acquisitions or business expansion, which could impact the company’s operations and market positioning.

data.title: Avidia Bancorp Appoints Michael Gilles to Board
data.description:
The latest update is out from Avidia Bancorp, Inc. ( (AVBC) ).

On September 25, 2025, Avidia Bancorp, Inc. appointed Michael O. Gilles to its Board of Directors, as well as to the Board of Directors of its subsidiary, Avidia Bank. Mr. Gilles, a seasoned financial services executive with over 45 years of community banking experience, will also serve on the Audit Committee. His appointment is expected to bring valuable financial expertise and insights as Avidia transitions to a public company. Mr. Gilles’ extensive background in financial management, internal controls, and risk management is anticipated to strengthen the company’s strategic direction and operational effectiveness.

More about Avidia Bancorp, Inc.

Avidia Bancorp, Inc. is the parent company of Avidia Bank, a Massachusetts-chartered stock savings bank headquartered in Hudson, Massachusetts. The bank operates nine full-service banking offices in western Middlesex County and eastern Worcester County in Massachusetts, focusing on community banking services.

data.title: First Savings Financial Group Announces Merger Agreement
data.description:
First Savings Financial Group ( (FSFG) ) has provided an announcement.

On September 24, 2025, First Savings Financial Group, Inc. (FSFG) announced a merger agreement with First Merchants Corporation, where FSFG will merge into First Merchants, with the latter as the surviving entity. This strategic move, expected to finalize in the first quarter of 2026, will see First Savings Bank merging into First Merchants Bank, potentially enhancing the market position of First Merchants. FSFG shareholders will receive 0.85 shares of First Merchants common stock for each FSFG share. The merger is subject to customary conditions, including regulatory and shareholder approvals, and includes a $10 million termination fee if FSFG withdraws under certain conditions.
